visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a split-screen. On the right, a woman with dark hair and heavy eye makeup, wearing a green knit shirt, talks and blinks frequently. On the left, a close-up of an eye is shown with a brush applying clear liquid. Bright studio lighting illuminates the beige background. Blue and black text banners appear at the top and bottom. (2) The woman holds a grey-to-white gradient cylindrical tube, an eyelash serum bottle, showing the brand name innete. She unscrews the cap to reveal a white brush tip and then a black mascara-style wand. Her hands move dynamically, pointing at the product. Yellow text overlays with emojis occupy the lower center of the screen. (3) A montage sequence shows a Korean woman in various poses, followed by a series of eye close-ups labeled DAY 1 to DAY 28. In these shots, a white-tipped brush is seen touching the upper lash line. The environment is an indoor setting with soft lighting. Red exclamation marks and white captions appear on the left side. (4) Returning to a medium close-up, the host points to her own eyes, showing thick, long lashes. She gestures excitedly with both fists raised and then points downwards towards the bottom of the frame. The background remains a solid neutral tone. Various colorful captions and heart symbols float around her face.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 近期韓網爆紅 不需卸妝的睫毛液!? [Variety]: 🇰🇷. (2) [Slogan]: 沒睫毛的快來看🔥 韓國人都「刷這個」😳. (3) [Subtitle]: 可用24小時的 天然睫毛精華?. (4) [Logo]: @hanhantw. (5) [Variety]: 實驗歐膩🇰🇷. (6) [Subtitle]: 最近韓國真的超爆紅這款欸🔥. (7) [Slogan]: innete日夜雙效睫毛滋養液. (8) [Subtitle]: 75萬韓國美妝Youtuber Soyoon共同研發!!!. (9) [Slogan]: (不需用卸妝油!) 所以可以24小時 一直照顧睫毛~! (DAY) (NIGHT). (10) [Slogan]: DAY1 DAY2 DAY7 DAY14 DAY21😍 DAY28🌟. (11) [Variety]: 超扯的!!!🤩. (12) [Subtitle]: 沒有刷睫毛膏! 只有使用這兩頭. (13) [Slogan]: innete日夜雙效睫毛滋養液✨. (14) [Variety]: (愛😂上). (15) [Subtitle]: 認真講! 用了4週之後 好像去哪接睫毛一樣 超級好看💖. (16) [Slogan]: ✨高級睫毛精華✨ 天然植物黑色素! 不會暈、不會掉粉. (17) [Subtitle]: 我跟Soyoon是朋友👭 所以這次特地問Soyoon拿到了 全台最低價團購. (18) [Slogan]: Soyoon特地給我超甜團購價🥰. (19) [Slogan]: 快點留言Tag你的朋友們 一起下單🙌 也可以在留言區找找看 有沒有同區的美女們 一起湊團喔!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main host, 1 female influencer in montage photos.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark brown hair, wearing a green knit short-sleeved top and professional makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A solid, neutral tan/beige wall with bright indoor studio lighting. Digital text overlays and split-screen segments frequently obscure the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched ding sound effect marks the start. A female voice speaks excitedly in Traditional Chinese over an upbeat 120 BPM electronic pop track with heavy drum machine kicks and synth melodies. The mix is clear and professional with no background noise. (2) A rapid whoosh sound effect triggers as the narration transitions to the product brand. The host's speech rate is fast and high-arousal. The BGM remains steady with a driving electronic pulse. Vocal clarity is exceptional, with no audible room tone or interference. (3) Another whoosh SFX occurs during a scene transition. The female narrator's pitch variability is high as she emphasizes the developer's name. The synthesizer-led music maintains its bouncy, major-mode character. The speech-music overlap is continuous and well-balanced throughout the timeline. (4) A pop sound effect accentuates a graphic appearing on screen. The narrator's tone remains friendly and persuasive. The BGM features layered electronic percussion and sharp synth transients. There are no incidental noises like object thuds or rustles in this studio-produced track. (5) A bright sparkle SFX marks the mention of the special price. The narrator's arousal peaks as she delivers the call to action. The music's beat strength remains prominent. The track concludes with a final energetic vocal phrase followed by a sharp fade of the background music.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Intro -> Social Proof -> Results -> Limited Offer -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To market a dual-ended Korean eyelash serum by showing long-term results and offering a discounted group purchase price to viewers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product usage demonstration, mention of specific brand name, and promotion of a group buy discount code/link.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy social media endorsement video using influencer proof and time-lapse eyelash growth evidence to drive immediate sales.
